name: Altitude Go Visa Signature Card

verdict.text: Keep if dining is a real category: 4x on the first $2K/quarter

earn_rates.category: Dining, takeout & restaurant delivery, first $2,000/qtr, then 1×

earn_note: Discount stores/supercenters and wholesale clubs are excluded from the grocery and gas bonus categories, so a Walmart or Costco grocery run earns the 1× base, not 2×. Points earn as 1 base + bonus, so the categories shown are the total rate, not stacked on top of the base separately.

redemption_options.method: Deposit to a U.S. Bank checking or savings account
Merchandise, gift cards, travel, or statement credit

points.note: U.S. Bank matches charity redemptions 100%: donate points and the charity effectively receives double. Otherwise, redemption value tops out around 1¢/point regardless of method, since there's no transfer-partner ecosystem behind this program.

transfer_partners.highlight: No transfer partners: points redeem directly for cash, travel, merchandise, or gift cards at a flat rate.

credits.name: Streaming Credit
credits.subtitle: auto-applies · 11 consecutive months of streaming purchases
credits.description: A $15 statement credit automatically applied after 11 consecutive calendar months of eligible streaming purchases (Netflix, Hulu, Apple Music, and similar), if the account is in good standing.
tips: Stacks with the 2× streaming earn rate, so you get the points and the credit.

insurance.detail: Not responsible for unauthorized transactions once reported
Not publicly documented for this card
Not publicly documented for this card
Not publicly documented for this card

protection_note: U.S. Bank doesn't publish a purchase-protection or extended-warranty guide for this card the way it does for Shield, so check your actual Guide to Benefits after approval rather than assuming standard Visa Signature protections apply.
rental_note: No auto rental coverage documented publicly for this card as of this writing.

services.name: 20,000-point welcome bonus
services.detail: After $1,000 in net purchases within the first 90 days. Not eligible if you've received a new-account bonus for this card in the last 5 years.

services.name: 0% intro APR
services.detail: 0% on purchases and balance transfers for the first 15 billing cycles, then 17.49%–27.49% variable.

services.name: U.S. Bank ExtendPay Plan
services.detail: Pay off up to 50% of your credit line in fixed installments with a $0 fee offer for plans opened in the first 60 days.

additional_cards.title: Authorized users

benefits.text: Earns points on their spend (into your account)

additional_cards.note: No cost to add: a simple way to pool a partner's or teenager's dining and grocery spend into the 4x/2x categories.
